name: Rabbitmq
tagline: With tens of thousands of users, RabbitMQ is one of the most popular open source message brokers.
description:
With tens of thousands of users, RabbitMQ is one of the most popular open source message brokers.

Docs: https://www.rabbitmq.com/documentation.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3-management
    hostname: rabbitmq
    environment:
      - RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER=u14675216b0
      - RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS=8897dd6d7da0ef07b8c9a8571a766f6f
      - PORT=${PORT:-5672}
    healthcheck:
      test: rabbitmq-diagnostics -q ping
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 10
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq-data:/var/lib/rabbitmq/
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42099:15672
volumes:
  rabbitmq-data: null
